candidates.why: Best semantic match to total PPE; preferred total line even though preview values are blank.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets, Gross
candidates.why: Tangible fixed assets but specifically right-of-use assets/leases, not preferred for baseline PPE.

candidates.why: Accumulated depreciation contra-asset, not PPE itself.
Not PPE.

candidates.why: Cash flow gain/loss item, not balance-sheet PPE stock.
Cash flow investing item, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit total PPE label despite blank preview values, per rule that blank recent columns do not invalidate a correct label. Added the populated machinery/equipment line as second-priority fallback.
